programme.title: Mrs. Golden Snake
programme.desc: The Sword Sect faces Lady Golden Snake's revival after her seal breaks. Demon Qu Ling and disciple Bian Xiaoya unite to reclaim the sword and seal her.

programme.title: Peak Confrontation
programme.desc: Gangster Chu Tian Kuo involuntarily participates in a competition to win the golden mask. But during the struggle for the mask, he is framed & subsequently rescued by the princess of a foreign tribe.

programme.title: Ghost Mantis 2 Mutation
programme.desc: Entomologist Su Hao is kidnapped & forced to participate in splicing experiments. To halt the inhumane experiments, Su Hao fights in a life-and-death battle against the demonic leader.

programme.title: Extreme Speed Police-The War on Drugs
programme.desc: Based on a true drug case, this gripping tale follows anti-narcotics officers risking their lives in deadly missions, vowing to wipe out drugs and safeguard the peace of the people.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep31
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep32
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: Sword Sovereign: Heavenbreaker
programme.desc: Many years ago, Jian Nan Tian is kidnapped by Xue Yu Lou while protecting the Sword Sect. Many years later, Xue Yu Lou strikes again, attacking the Sword Sect to capture Nan Tian's son, Jian Wu Shuang.

programme.title: New Dragon Gate Inn
programme.desc: Set in the Ming Dynasty, due to a mysterious imperial edict, the general of the East China Sea, Zhou Huai'an, is tasked to escort orphan Qu Ling to the capital & to await the Ghost Festival.

programme.title: Shuigui Bride
programme.desc: On a stormy night, 8 people gather in a dilapidated temple to take shelter from the rain. They begin discussing the legend of the Water Ghost Bride, kick-starting a series of mysterious murders.

programme.title: Snake
programme.desc: Despite the stories of a snake woman who devours those who venture into the mountains, the owner of the snake factory ignores the warning, leading his team into forbidden grounds.

programme.title: Guardian Of Graveyard
programme.desc: Treasure hunters Xun Ye, Feng Yao, Cai Qing Yun, Wang Ya Zi & others encounter various dangers as they seek treasure at Qinling Phoenix Mountain, even averting conspiracies & diplomatic issues.

programme.title: Shell Girl
programme.desc: Upon waking up in a laboratory, a girl finds that she has gained superior fighting skills but lost her memory. Hunted by an unknown man, she has to save herself & rediscover her identity.

programme.title: A Forbidden Marriage Ep03
programme.desc: Demon Sect's saintess Wang Yue is reborn after a near-death experience, becoming a humble orphan while holding onto her unfinished wish—to be with the righteous elder Yang Qing.

programme.title: A Forbidden Marriage Ep04
programme.desc: Demon Sect's saintess Wang Yue is reborn after a near-death experience, becoming a humble orphan while holding onto her unfinished wish—to be with the righteous elder Yang Qing.

programme.title: Bride And The Beast
programme.desc: Every year, a young girl must be sacrificed to the mountain god or a curse would befall their small village. Two young men must now rescue their beloved when she is chosen to be sacrifice.

programme.title: Deer Travel Notes
programme.desc: After losing its family to humans, a young deer joins a bear-led alliance seeking revenge. But a chance meeting with a kind human changes its heart, leading it to bridge both sides and bring peace.

programme.title: Second Life
programme.desc: Years ago, a little boy is born in prison and his mother was forced to give him up, losing all contact with him. When she is released, she tries her best to make amends to rebuild their relationship.

programme.title: Huang Jin Gui Shi Lu Film Series
programme.desc: With the influential sects at the brink of war, County Chief Lu instructs Chief Detective Duan Guang Long & siblings, Xue Xiao Feng & Xue Xiao Hua, to conduct a secret investigation on the matter.

programme.title: Monstert Of Er Long Lake
programme.desc: Yu Huan wants to marry his childhood sweetheart Xiao Yu but is stopped by a huge bride price. With three goofy friends, he tries to raise money but accidentally awakens a century-old lake monster.

programme.title: Red Land
programme.desc: Humans battle underground mutants "Headhunters" and the "Cave Tribe," fighting to survive and reclaim their home on the dangerous, resource-scarce surface.

programme.title: Horror Legend Of Miao Ling
programme.desc: After the deaths of several people, allegedly from the Gu curse, Lu Wen Liang & Zhang Chi Yi venture into the secluded village in the mountains to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Mi Wu Ci Sha
programme.desc: The daughter of a late great general embarks on a journey for revenge when she discovers that the mastermind to the murder of her biological father is her foster father, the Prime Minister.
